title: Buttery Chewy Irish Ghee Bowl
description: A warm, energizing bowl that marries Irish oats, ghee, and Mediterranean flavors into a buttery, chewy breakfast delight.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine rolled oats and oat milk, bring to a gentle simmer over medium heat.
Stir occasionally for 5 minutes until the oats have absorbed most of the liquid and are creamy.
Add chopped dried apricots and toasted walnuts, continue to simmer for another 2 minutes to warm the fruit and nuts.
Reduce heat to low, stir in honey, ghee, cinnamon, and vanilla extract until the ghee melts and the mixture is glossy.
Remove from heat and let the bowl sit for 2 minutes so it thickens slightly and the flavors meld.
Spoon the mixture into two heat‑proof bowls, ensuring an even distribution.
Garnish with a light dusting of cinnamon and a few walnut halves on top if desired.
Serve immediately while warm for a buttery, chewy breakfast experience.
